FGOCORE-GOLDEN_APPLE.title: Golden Apple
FGOCORE-GOLDEN_APPLE.description: #Gain !Energy! Energy. Draw !C! card(s). The grind never ends.
FGOCORE-MAPO_TOFU.title: Extra Spicy Mapo Tofu
FGOCORE-MAPO_TOFU.description: #Heal !H! HP. Lose !HpLoss! HP. Delicious. Painful. Delicious.
FGOCORE-INSUFFICIENT_QP.title: Insufficient QP!
FGOCORE-INSUFFICIENT_QP.description: #Gain !Gold! gold. It will not be enough. It is never enough.
FGOCORE-TEN_PULL_SUMMON.title: 10-Pull Summon
FGOCORE-TEN_PULL_SUMMON.description: #Add !C! random card(s) from your character's pool to your hand, costing 0 this turn. May the gacha bless you.
FGOCORE-BLACK_KEYS.title: Black Keys
FGOCORE-BLACK_KEYS.description: #Deal !D! damage. Add a copy of this card to your discard pile. There are always more.
FGOCORE-EXP_EMBER.title: EXP Ember
FGOCORE-EXP_EMBER.description: #Upgrade !C! random card(s) in your hand for this combat. Everything is fodder.
FGOCORE-PALINGENESIS.title: Palingenesis
FGOCORE-PALINGENESIS.description: #Raise your Max HP by !H! and heal !H! HP. The Grail accepts your offering.
